chapter_title.ar: باب عِدَّةِ الْحُبْلَى الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا وَ نَفَقَتِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 44 – Waiting period of the pregnant woman widowed from her husband, and her expenses

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/195)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/195)
text: هُ قَالَ فِي الْحُبْلَى الْمُتَوَفَّى عَنْهَا زَوْجُهَا إِنَّهُ لَا نَفَقَةَ لَهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Regarding the pregnant woman widowed from her husband, there is not expenses for her’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A pregnant widow does not have any right for maintenance.’”
